human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1019 requirements for creative-approvals-specific workflow handling, evidence and confidentiality expectations, legal, editorial, creative direction, rights, contractual, media, financial, platform-policy, and signoff boundaries, scenario completeness, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, execution-processing-and-fulfillment, and professional-and-information-services sets are declared and validated.

Scenario coverage includes normal creative approval execution, incomplete inputs, review conflicts, missing completion evidence, confidentiality conflicts, rights and deadline exceptions, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence facts, conflicting policies, realistic terminology, and tenant adaptation.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed creative approval status, proofing coordination, review tracking, approver evidence capture, rework routing, delivery handoff, confidentiality handling, rights awareness, and completion evidence rather than legal, editorial, creative direction, privacy, media strategy, financial, production, contractual, rights, platform-policy, or final signoff authority.

Source set includes 4A's conduct and agency search guidance, IAB/4A's media-buy terms, IAB Tech Lab creative standards, AICP digital production guidelines, FTC online advertising and endorsement guidance, and Coalition for Better Ads standards with explicit refresh and decay posture.

Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported approval, unauthorized disclosure or reuse, unreviewed claim or disclosure approval, unresolved rights or review conflict, and generic treatment of materially different creative channels or production workflows.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as tenant, channel, engagement, SOW, NDA, rights, production, publisher, platform, privacy, claim, disclosure, and authority prerequisites for specialized creative approval execution.

Runtime remains specification-based; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, retrieval wiring, mutation safeguards, rollback controls, and non-regression validation.
